mock_response.result: {"review_status":"completed","pass":false,"issues":[{"check":"SQL injection via string interpolation","verdict":"User input from request.GET inserted directly into SQL query","fix":"Use parameterized queries: db.execute('SELECT * FROM items WHERE name = %s', [query])","severity":"critical","confidence":"high","category":"security","file":"src/handler.py","line_hint":"L12","evidence":["line 12: f\"SELECT * FROM items WHERE name = '{query}'\" uses f-string with user input","line 11: query comes from request.GET.get('q') — unvalidated user input"],"what_would_falsify_this":"If query is validated/escaped before reaching this line, or if db.execute auto-parameterizes f-strings","suggested_validation":"Check if db.execute handles f-string parameterization (it does not in standard Django/SQLAlchemy)","abstain_condition":""}],"summary":"SQL injection via unparameterized query"}
